Research this exact question and give a definitive answer: Does Gemini API OAuth (personal Google account login via 'gemini auth login') give more quota/rate limits than using API keys (GEMINI_API_KEY)? Specifically for gemini-2.5-flash model. Find: (1) exact RPM and TPM limits for OAuth vs API key on free tier, (2) any official Google/Gemini docs or community posts confirming the difference, (3) whether switching back to OAuth would fix our 429 rate limit errors. Save findings to /tmp/oauth_vs_apikey_research.md and report back.
Fix OAuth token failure for agents: 'beast', 'vision', 'shuri', 'captain'
